description: CompositionBlack and white check shirt made of blended fabric, has a spread collar with full buttoned placket, long sleeves with mid button tabs and buttoned cuffs, pockets on the front with buttoned closures and a curved hemFitRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDry inside outDo not bleachDo not wringUse warm ironCapture the fun of a new season in fashion with this stylish shirt from femella. The blended fabric will keep you fresh and comfortable all day long.
